is DENIED. No order retaining jurisdiction on file prior to dismissal. Sayta v. Chu (2017) 17 Cal.App.5th 960. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Vorrice Cooper, 510-590-0909, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT VORRIECE COOPER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS NOT TIMELY, WAS NOT BROUGHT IN A REASONABLE TIME, AND IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING. MOVING PARTY DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO CONTEST THERFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR AGRUMENT. Opposing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Vorriece Cooper, Only.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Darius T. Chan, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Eric Huang, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Vorriece A. Cooper.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Ivory Cooper was filed today, April 15, 2010.
Default was entered as to defendant Vorriece A. Cooper on March 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Eric Huang, and against the Defaulted Defendant Vorriece A. Cooper as follows:

Damages/Principal - $107,176.72.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,266.59.
Attorney's Fees - $10,700.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $130,553.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Vorriece Cooper, Only.
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Continued To Apr-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Darius T. Chan, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Eric Huang, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Vorriece A. Cooper or Ivory Cooper.
Default was entered against defendant Vorriece A. Cooper on March 16, 2010.
Defendant Ivory Cooper filed a General Denial to plaintiff's complaint on March 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 26, 2010.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing until a actual dismissal has been filed by plaintiff as to defendant Ivory Cooper. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to April 15, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
